name: Salatsauce#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the peppercorns into a coarse powder.
2. Add the salt and mustard to the crushed peppercorns.
3. Stir in the olive oil and tarragon vinegar until well combined.
4. Place the lettuce leaf on top of the mixture.
5. Chill the salad sauce in the refrigerator until ready to serve.
6. Before serving, stir the salad sauce gently until all the lettuce is coated.
